parsed.recommendation_text: The Acer Swift Go 14 is the best value for a student within budget constraints. It offers an IPS display, lightweight design, and decent performance at $699. While it lacks the premium features of higher-end models like OLED displays or better processors, its price point makes it highly attractive for students who prioritize affordability over top-tier specs.
parsed.selection_rationale: Balances quality and budget; meets student needs without breaking the bank.
